_model._comment: Platform geometry for Shapez 2. See docs/generator-spec.md.
_model.interior_per_axis: 20*units - 4 (each unit is a 20x20 bounding cell with a 16x16 buildable interior; each internal join fills the shared 2+2 border, +4 per seam)
_model.units_order: [along_X, along_Y] in the platform-local frame (independent of the placed platform's R)

verified.Foundation_1x4: 4 units at coordinate pitch 20 in X, reproduced exactly by generator M2

_model.caveats: Multi-unit interiors are model-derived, not independently measured. Corpus extents are confounded by per-platform rotation and by belts/ports reaching the rim, so single designs read slightly under the true interior. input_y/output_y/port_x_range are the rotator-style port convention, not platform invariants.

Foundation_1x4._port_note: Ports span four units; the single port_x_range model does not apply. Per-unit ports sit at the same offset as the 1x1, repeated at unit pitch 20.

Foundation_2x4._note: Corrected grid_size: was [80, 60]. Used for painters, mixers with fluid input.

Foundation_2x4_Flipped._note: Geometry assumed identical to Foundation_2x4; flip affects port arrangement only.

Layout_Normal_3_L._interior_note: Irregular: interior = union of per-unit 16x16 plus +4 per internal adjacency; compute from shape_units.

Layout_Normal_4_T._note: T-shape: top row full, bottom center only

Layout_Normal_4_2x2._note: Full 2x2 square; same footprint as Foundation_2x2

Layout_ShapeMiner._note: Non-standard size (does not follow the 20-unit foundation model). Measured from corpus; verify.

Layout_ShapeMinerExtensionx3._note: Miner extension platform; geometry not yet measured.

Layout_FluidMiner._note: Non-standard size; fluid (pipe) ports only. Measured from corpus; verify.

Layout_FluidMinerExtensionx3._note: Miner extension platform; geometry not yet measured.
